title: B.Braun India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: B.Braun India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
B.Braun India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About B.Braun India:
B.Braun India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
